0.response: {"Q0":"I memorized the sequence for digging in planet blue(LJK) when it became necessary at the tail end of the game. When choosing between galaxy, I memorized the next galaxy pair that would be shown knowing which of the galaxies had a higher probability of offering more payoffs. When any galaxy with a higher probability of winning was shown with the right arrow, I pressed \"s\" to go to that galaxy. I used the same strategy for a galaxy with a left arrow, tweaking to \"A\". I also avoided digging in the yellow planet and red planet when the astronaut left. I followed these strategies religiously albeit with some errors. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"Not really. I payed attention to the planets and galaxies."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, it was very clear to me."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I really enjoyed the game and the study and would love to participate in future studies. Thank you."}
